title: 5 x No Stuffing Crinkle Dog Toys Plush Medium Large | With Extra Material Layer, Crinkle Paper & 2 Squeakers | Stuffingless Squeaky Dog Toy | Stimulating & Interactive Chew Toys | Small & Medium Dogs
features: 【STRONGER DESIGN】- We added an extra material layer to the body of our 46-49cm (18-19inch) toy, helping to ensure our product is stronger than others on the market today
【ADDED STIMULATION】- We also added crinkle paper in the body which others dont have! Ensuring an extra exciting layer of texture and noise for hours of interactive play
【DOUBLE SQUEAKERS】- Squeakers in head and tail, perfect for playful pups who love sound aswell as appealing to our dogs natural instincts in our 46 - 49 cm plushes
【NO STUFFING, NO MESS】- No more walking into the living room to relax with a cuppa only to see it covered in fluff! Stuffing-free construction ensures safe play and easy cleanup if needed
【INSTINCTS】- Our durable dog toys are not just for fun; they’re designed with your dog’s instincts in mind. No random tigers or elephants here!
【GIFTABLE】- Unlike others that arrive in plain plastic bags, our set comes in an attractive and durable box, making it a perfect gift for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion
